creator: bryanf@samurai.com
text:
I just used the FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE bootonly ISO to do a FTP install 
under VirtualBox 1.6.0 by doing the following:

- configure VM to use Intel PRO/1000 MT Desktop network interface (em 
driver) instead of PCnet-Fast III (pcn driver)
- DNS lookups not working in sysinstall, so had to enter a manual 
install URL with an IP instead of hostname (I used ftp4, which is the 
isc.org mirror)

After install, DNS and everything else appears to be working fine.

Thanks,
Bryan
